2026-07-19.line: 11am Post Carousel #1 (5 things Claude, 7 slides) to TikTok photo mode + IG
2026-07-19.caption: TikTok: What is Claude used for? 5 things you didn't know Claude could do 🔖 #Claude #AI #AITools
2026-07-19.caption_ig: 5 things you didn't know Claude AI could do 🤯 Save this + send #2 to your friend who codes everything by hand. #Claude #AI #AITools #Productivity
2026-07-19.tip: On TikTok add a trending calm/lofi background sound to the photo post, it boosts reach.

2026-07-19.line: 12pm Post X article #1 (5 things Claude) + header image
2026-07-19.tip: Copy the article + attach the '5 Things' header image from our Claude chat. Stay 10 min for replies.
Record ALL screen captures first (PDF, app build, spreadsheet, emails, prompt comparisons, trades estimate), then all face clips in one sitting.

2026-07-20.line: 1pm Post Quick Video A 'What is Anthropic' to TikTok + IG + YouTube Shorts
2026-07-20.hook: Over 90 thousand people googled what is Anthropic this week. Here's the answer in 35 seconds.
2026-07-20.caption: TikTok: What is Anthropic? The company behind Claude, explained in 35 seconds. Everyone is searching this right now 🔎 #Anthropic #Claude #AI #TechTok
2026-07-20.caption_ig: What is Anthropic and why is everyone suddenly searching it? The Claude company, explained fast. Send this to your group chat. #Anthropic #Claude #AI
2026-07-20.tip: One take, face to camera. Say 'what is Anthropic' in the first 3 seconds. YouTube title: 'What is Anthropic? Explained in 35 Seconds' #Shorts

2026-07-20.line: Optional if time: film tomorrow's 1Password video (one take talking head)
2026-07-20.tip: Filming ahead by one day keeps posting stress free. Skip if today is packed.

2026-07-21.line: 9am Post LinkedIn PDF carousel (5 Things Claude deck)
2026-07-21.tip: Upload the PDF from our chat as a document post, 8 to 10am window. Caption is in chat too. PDFs get big dwell time on LinkedIn.
Article #2 + 'Claude Can Now Log Into Your Accounts' image from chat. No filming needed, just paste.

2026-07-21.line: 1pm Film + post Video 2 'Claude logs into accounts' to TikTok + IG + YouTube Shorts
2026-07-21.hook: Claude can now log into your accounts for you. And no, that's not a hack, it's official.
2026-07-21.caption: Claude can now use your 1Password logins, what is Anthropic even building? AI that actually DOES things is here. Would you trust it? #Claude #AI #TechNews #Anthropic
2026-07-21.tip: One take talking head, your fastest format. End on the question, comment debates are fuel. This is the only filming today.

2026-07-22.line: BATCH FILM DAY: videos for Thu through Sat + ElevenLabs (5 to 6 videos)
2026-07-22.tip: Order: teachers, 5 things Claude screen demos, psychology prompt (run it FRESH on camera), talking to ChatGPT wrong, trades, ElevenLabs clone if you set it up. Change shirts between talking heads.

2026-07-22.line: 1pm Post Video 3 'Teachers free Claude' to TikTok + IG + YouTube Shorts
2026-07-22.hook: Teachers, you get premium AI free for a whole year, and most of you still haven't claimed it.
2026-07-22.caption: Teachers just won, free premium Claude AI for a year + student data protection. 3 things you didn't know. Tag a teacher 🍎 #Teachers #AI #Claude #TeachersOfTikTok
2026-07-22.tip: Film this one first in the morning so it's ready by 1pm. The tag a teacher CTA drives shares, shares are weighted heaviest.

2026-07-23.line: 7am Post Carousel #2 (psychology prompt, 5 slides) to IG
2026-07-23.caption: The ChatGPT psychology prompt everyone's searching 🧠 Full prompt is on slide 2, save this. Rate yours 1 to 10 below. #ChatGPT #AI #Prompts
2026-07-23.tip: Thursday morning is Instagram's weekly peak, don't post this late.

2026-07-23.line: 10am Post X article #3 (psychology prompt) + header image
1pm Post Video 4 + Carousel #2 to TikTok, video also to YouTube Shorts
2026-07-23.hook: This psychology prompt made ChatGPT describe me better than my own friends can.
2026-07-23.caption: The ChatGPT psychology prompt 🧠 Copy it: "Based on everything you know about me from our chats, act as a psychologist. Tell me the patterns you see in how I think, what probably drives me, and one blind spot I have. Be specific, not flattering." Rate yours 1 to 10 below. #ChatGPT #AI #Psychology #Prompts
2026-07-23.tip: Prompt in the caption = saves. Say 'full prompt in the caption' out loud in the video.

2026-07-23.line: 3pm Post Video 1 '5 things Claude' to TikTok + IG + YouTube Shorts
2026-07-23.hook: Everyone's suddenly asking what Claude is actually used for. Here's what nobody shows you.
2026-07-23.caption: TikTok: What is Claude used for? 5 things you didn't know Claude could do 🤯 Claude tips for beginners, how to use Claude in 2026. Which one surprised you? #Claude #AI #AITools
2026-07-23.caption_ig: 5 things you didn't know Claude AI could do, send #2 to your friend who still codes everything by hand 😅 Save this. #Claude #AI #AITools #Productivity
2026-07-23.tip: Filmed Wednesday, just post. Say 'what Claude is actually used for' in the first 3 seconds. YouTube title: 'What is Claude Used For? 5 Things You Didn't Know' #Shorts

2026-07-23.line: Also film today if you have time: any video not finished Wednesday
2026-07-23.tip: Second heavy day. Anything filmed today makes Friday and Saturday post-only days.

2026-07-24.line: 1pm Post Video 5 'Talking to ChatGPT wrong' to TikTok + IG + YouTube Shorts
2026-07-24.hook: You've been talking to ChatGPT wrong. Three fixes, and it gets scary good.
2026-07-24.caption: TikTok: How to talk with ChatGPT, 3 mistakes everyone makes. How to use ChatGPT like the top 1% of users. Save this 🔖 #ChatGPT #AI #AITips #HowToUseChatGPT
2026-07-24.caption_ig: You've been using ChatGPT wrong, 3 fixes 🔖 Save this and send it to the person who types 'help with essay.' #ChatGPT #AI #AITips
2026-07-24.tip: Split-screen bad prompt vs good prompt sells each fix without explaining.

2026-07-24.line: 3pm Post ElevenLabs video 'I cloned my voice with AI' to TikTok + IG + YouTube Shorts
2026-07-24.hook: This is the coolest thing you can do with AI right now. I cloned my own voice in two minutes. Listen.
2026-07-24.caption: TikTok: Cool things you can do with AI: I cloned my voice in 2 minutes and it speaks Spanish, which I don't 🤯 Wait for the last part. #AI #ElevenLabs #VoiceCloning #CoolThingsWithAI
2026-07-24.caption_ig: I cloned my voice with AI in 2 minutes and now it speaks languages I don't 🤯 The last 10 seconds is the part everyone should see. Send this to someone who thinks AI is all bad. #AI #VoiceCloning #ElevenLabs #TechTok
2026-07-24.tip: Filmed Wednesday. YouTube title: 'I Cloned My Voice With AI in 2 Minutes (ElevenLabs)' #Shorts

11am Post Video 6 'trades part 3' to TikTok + IG + YouTube Shorts
2026-07-25.hook: If you run an HVAC or roofing company, Claude can quote jobs while you're still on the roof.

2026-07-25.caption_ig: Running a trade business without AI in 2026 is leaving money on the table 🔧 Send this to a business owner. #SmallBusiness #AI #HVAC #Claude
2026-07-25.tip: Saturday midday is TikTok's best window, don't slip past noon.

2026-07-26.line: 9am Planning session with Claude: week 2 content + he builds your website (link hub, free prompt guide PDF, email signup, affiliate links)
